headline: Is Abbott (ABT) the Best Longevity Stock to Buy Now?
summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) is one of the 7 Best Longevity Stocks to Buy Now. On June 7, 2026, Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) announced new data showing that diabetic ketoacidosis, or DKA, “remains an important” but often undetected health concern for people with both Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes.
